name: Kim Weston
abstract: Kim Weston (born December 20, 1939) is an American soul singer and Motown alumna. In the 1960s, she scored hits with the songs "Love Me All the Way" and "Take Me in Your Arms (Rock Me a Little While)", and with her duet with Marvin Gaye, "It Takes Two".

concerts.label: The Mary McLeod Bethune Memorial Concert
Midnight Performance: Jazz Stars at Midnight
